HOME.SUMMARY: <location>London</location> based Design Engineer, hobbyist photographer and self-confessed tech nerd working at <company>Human Made Machine</company>
HOME.BODY: In a nutshell, i’m an ambitious and passionate front end developer with a keen eye for design. I strive to produce beautiful products that inspire and delight. I have a little over a decade of industry experience in both design and development. I’ve worked with great people, at some innovative companies for some industry leading brands.
